field_values.action_summary: Back at the Dead City, the protagonist undergoes intensive training in Martian language and telepathy under Sola's guidance. During this process, it is revealed that he possesses a unique mental defense that prevents Martians from reading his thoughts, and he encounters a newly hatched male who will become a rival.
field_values.camera_intent: Tight close-ups on protagonist face during telepathic attempts; Abstract visual effects for telepathy and mental walls; Two-shots of sola and protagonist during instruction
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Visual consistency of telepathic effect representation
Physical interaction mechanics between protagonist and young_martian
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH007_SC004

## Production Intent
Establish the protagonist's specialized mental defense through intensive Martian language and telepathic training. The scene must visually differentiate between standard telepathic communication and the protagonist's impenetrable mental barrier, while introducing a new character rival via physical interaction.

## Required Cast
- protagonist (experienced Earthman fighter)
- sola (instructor)
- young_martian (rival)

## Required Environments
- the_dead_city (training zone)

## Continuity Constraints
- Visual consistency of telepathic effect representation (mental walls)
- Physical interaction mechanics between protagonist and young_martian

## Beat List
- BT001: Intensive Martian language training
- BT002: Telepathic attempt and discovery of mental defense
- BT003: Encounter with young_martian
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
